summary: Day 12 Email Notification Templates - All 16 backend tests passed. Verified that all email functions are properly wired into paymentService.ts, leads.ts, contracts.ts, quotes.ts, and sequenceEngine.ts. Email functions gracefully handle missing Resend API key (log and return false, no crashes).
critical_code_review_comments: paymentService.ts correctly imports and calls: sendDepositPaymentEmail (line 72), sendFinalPaymentEmail (line 143), sendDepositReceivedEmail (line 210), sendFinalPaymentReceivedEmail (line 259), sendPaymentReceivedNotification (lines 219 & 267)
leads.ts correctly imports sendTestimonialRequestEmail (line 3) and calls it in mark-delivered endpoint (line 1094)
contracts.ts already properly wires sendContractSentEmail (line 332) and sendContractAgreedNotification (line 404)
quotes.ts already properly wires sendQuoteEmail (line 646), sendQuoteAcceptedNotification (line 961), sendQuoteDeclinedNotification (line 1042)
sequenceEngine.ts properly imports and uses sendSequenceEmail (line 113)
All email functions gracefully handle missing RESEND_API_KEY by logging and returning false instead of crashing
seed_data_creation: Test leads created during testing were cleaned up: TEST_Day12_EmailWiring, TEST_Day12_AutoResponse
context_for_next_testing_agent: Day 12 Email Notification Templates fully tested. All email functions are wired correctly. Backend logs show: '[DEV] Delivery notification would go to', '[DEV] Contract sent email would go to', '[DEV] Auto-response email would go to', 'Resend not configured, skipping...' - proving the email functions are called but gracefully handle missing API key. Sequence enrollment also works: '[Seq] Enrolled ... in Quote Follow-Up'

features_tested.POST /api/contracts/:id/send - triggers: PASSED - logs show [DEV] Contract sent email
features_tested.POST /api/quotes/:quoteId/send - trigger: PASSED - logs show Resend not configured (graceful)

paymentService.ts.status: VERIFIED - All 5 functions imported and called
